name: Bike Share Buddy
tagline: Quick access to many bike sharing programs
description: Helps you find bike share stations in any city you're traveling in across the United States and Europe.

name: Curling Scoreboard
tagline: Scorekeeping for the sport of curling
description: A web app for tracking scores during a curling match, designed for simplicity on and off the ice.

name: PerfPro Converter
tagline: Convert PerfPro workouts for TrainingPeaks, Strava, and Garmin
description: Converts PerfPro / Computrainer .3dp workout files into TCX files you can upload to TrainingPeaks, Strava, Garmin Connect, and more — all in your browser, no uploads required.
